The prisoners are thrust into a massive underground amphitheater for a ten-day gladiatorial tournament. Carter fights various men and beasts, winning over the crowd through sheer combat prowess.
Prisoners are thrust into the dark, cavernous amphitheater under heavy dread.
Carter stands victorious amidst combat debris as the crowd reacts to his prowess.
A series of escalating gladiatorial bouts involving men and beasts.
